// ── EXPORT UPDATED HTML ── async function exportUpdatedHTML() { const btn = document.querySelector('.export-html-btn'); if (btn) { btn.textContent = '⏳ Preparing...'; btn.disabled = true; } try { // Fetch the current index.html const res = await fetch('/'); if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Could not fetch site HTML'); let siteHTML = await res.text(); // Replace each photo in the HTML with admin-uploaded versions const stored = localStorage.getItem('mp_site_photos'); if (stored) { const adminPhotos = JSON.parse(stored); Object.keys(adminPhotos).forEach(function(section) { const sectionPhotos = adminPhotos[section]; if (!sectionPhotos || !sectionPhotos.length) return; sectionPhotos.forEach(function(photo, idx) { if (!photo.src) return; // Find the img with this data-photo-id and replace its src const marker = 'data-photo-id="' + section + '-' + idx + '"'; const markerPos = siteHTML.indexOf(marker); if (markerPos < 0) return; // Find the src="..." after this marker const srcMatch = siteHTML.slice(markerPos).match(/src="data:image\/[^"]+"/); if (srcMatch) { const oldSrc = srcMatch[0]; const newSrc = 'src="' + photo.src + '"'; siteHTML = siteHTML.slice(0, markerPos) + siteHTML.slice(markerPos).replace(oldSrc, newSrc); } }); }); } // Download const blob = new Blob([siteHTML], { type: 'text/html' }); const a = document.createElement('a'); a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob); a.download = 'index.html'; a.click(); showToast('✓ Updated HTML exported! Upload this as index.html to Vercel.'); } catch(e) { console.error('Export error:', e); showToast('Export failed: ' + e.message, 'error_t'); } finally { if (btn) { btn.textContent = '⬇ Export HTML'; btn.disabled = false; } } }
